name: Dark Matter
short_description: Dark Matter is a classic arcade space shooter inspired by Asteroids, featuring fast-paced ship combat, physics-based movement, and score-driven gameplay.
detailed_description:
Classic Arcade Space Shooter Action

Dark Matter is a retro-style arcade space shooter inspired by classic games like Asteroids. Players pilot a spacecraft in open space, destroying enemies and hazards while managing momentum, inertia, and positioning.

The focus is on fast reactions, precise control, and survival under constant pressure.

Physics-Based Combat and Movement

Movement in Dark Matter is driven by physics rather than fixed paths. Thrust, rotation, and momentum all matter, rewarding players who master ship control and spatial awareness.

Combat is immediate and skill-based, with escalating difficulty that challenges reflexes and situational awareness rather than long-term progression systems.

Score-Driven, Replayable Gameplay

Dark Matter is built around short, intense play sessions and high-score chasing. Each run pushes players to improve efficiency, accuracy, and survivability.

This is a pure arcade experience, designed for replayability rather than narrative or exploration.

Key Features

  • Classic arcade space shooter gameplay

  • Physics-based ship movement and combat

  • Fast-paced, reflex-driven action

  • Score-focused design built for replayability

  • Retro-inspired presentation

  • Single-player arcade experience
